overall.description: First-person perspective from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with black nail polish and distinctive forearm implants waiting at a high-security sliding door. The door opens to reveal intense golden light as the player enters a luxurious interior space, likely related to the character Lizzie Wizzy.

agents.ego_description: standing still with both hands pressed flat against the cold black metallic door surface, fingers spread

entered.detail: sleek black metallic sliding door with reflective surface and vertical seams
illuminated numeric keypad panel with circular buttons embedded in the door
circular metallic door handle with reflective gold finish below the keypad

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a first-person view of hands with black nail polish pressed against a sleek black security door. The environment is dimly lit with warm ambient lighting, showing a digital keypad and brass handle on the door surface. The character waits motionless in a narrow enclosed space.

events.description: high-security door begins sliding open horizontally, splitting in the middle
bright golden light streams through the widening gap, creating lens flare effects

agents.ego_description: maintaining position as the door automatically slides open, revealing intense light from the adjacent room

entered.detail: blinding vertical strip of warm golden light emanating from the room beyond

segments.scene_description: The security door begins to slide open, splitting down the middle and revealing an intense golden backlight from the adjacent room. The lighting shifts from dim artificial to a mix of warm interior and blinding exterior light. The door panels recede to the sides as the gap widens.

events.description: steps through the doorway threshold into the brightly lit interior space

agents.ego_description: walking forward through the doorway into the golden-lit room, right forearm with red dot implants visible in the light

entered.detail: brass door handle mounted on the interior side of the door frame
warmly illuminated interior space with luxurious golden ambient lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward through the doorway, transitioning from the dim exterior to a warmly lit interior. The security door and keypad recede behind as the character enters the golden-lit space. An interior door handle becomes visible on the left as the player advances into the luxurious room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a dim, enclosed security vestibule into a brilliantly illuminated luxury interior. It begins with a close-up of hands with black nail polish pressed against a sleek black security door, where the atmosphere is dark and confined. As the door begins to slide open, the dim artificial lighting is suddenly overtaken by an intense, blinding golden backlight that pours through the widening gap. The camera then moves forward through the threshold, transitioning from the shadows of the exterior into the warm, golden glow of the room. The scene finally expands as the security door and keypad recede behind the viewer, revealing an interior door handle on the left as the character advances deeper into the opulent space.
